title: piper ceramicum
intro: Piper ceramicum, also known as the Indian long pepper, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Indian subcontinent. The medicinal properties of Piper ceramicum lie in its seeds, which contain piperine, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. This plant has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Piper ceramicum are often used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
